step1.title: How can we help you?
step1.subtitle: Select the category that best describes your concern

step2.title: Where is the problem located?
step2.subtitle: Tap on the affected area(s) on the body
step2.noSelection: Please select at least one area

step3.title: Let's take some photos
step3.subtitle: Good photos help us diagnose your condition faster

tips.title: Tips for great photos
tips.distance: Take one close-up and one from further away
tips.focus: Make sure the affected area is in focus

step4.title: Upload your photos
step4.subtitle: Take or upload up to 3 photos of the affected area

closeup.title: Close-up
closeup.description: Detailed view of the affected area

context.title: From further away
context.description: Shows the location on your body

step5.title: Tell us about the timeline
step5.subtitle: When did you first notice this problem?
step5.changeDescription: Please describe how it has changed

step7.title: Medical history
step7.subtitle: This helps us provide better care

medications.question: Are you currently taking any medications?

selfTreated.question: Have you already tried treating this yourself?

step8.title: Personal details
step8.subtitle: These details are medically relevant
step8.notesPlaceholder: Anything else you'd like us to know...

step9.title: Almost there!
step9.subtitle: Sign in or create an account to submit your consultation
step9.healthDataConsent: I explicitly consent to the processing of my health data (including uploaded photos and medical information) for the purpose of dermatological remote assessment by licensed physicians. I may withdraw this consent at any time with effect for the future. Details can be found in our <privacyLink>Privacy Policy (Health Data section)</privacyLink>.
